warning.title: Important
warning.message: After linking, you must use your OSI Server credentials to log in. Your local password will be replaced by the server password hash.

success.title: Successfully Connected
success.message: Your account is now linked as {{username}} on OSI Server.

unlink.confirm: Are you sure? After disconnecting, you must use your original local password to log in.

errors.networkError: Cannot reach OSI Server. Check the URL and your internet connection.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
